CustomField.description: 調査基準価格÷予定価格（公表価格or推定価格） ※公表を優先
CustomField.formula: IF ( OR( ISBLANK(PublishedEstimatePrice__c), ISNULL(PublishedEstimatePrice__c) ), EstimatedSurveyStandardPrice__c / EstimatedPresumptionPrice__c, PublishedSurveyStandardPrice__c / PublishedEstimatePrice__c )
CustomField.label: 調査基準比率
